title: Swap assign/3 for stream/3 on a list
prompt:
Write lib/my_app_web/live/todo_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.TodoLive) that loads MyApp.Todos.list_todos/0 via stream(socket, :todos, todos) (not assign(socket, :todos, todos)) in handle_params/3. mount/3 returns {:ok, stream(socket, :todos, [])}. Render a
containing
{t.text}
.
tier_rationale: Canonical stream/3 replacement for a list. Known idiom with a specific container pattern.
research_citation: oliver-kriska/claude-elixir-phoenix iron law: 'Use streams for lists >100 items'
